data.name: 惡魔少女 / Devil Girl
data.detailed_description:
劇本: tigerteeth

──當你凝視著深淵，深淵也凝視著你。

◆特色系統

　◇在環境設定裡能打開全CG模式,自由瀏覽HCG

　◇無壓力操作設計-快速的文字跳轉系統

◆故事

“餵，醒醒，打算睡到什麼時候呢？”
揉揉迷糊的眼睛，一個金發赤瞳的少女正坐在椅子上高傲的看著我。

少女說他是上天派來拯救我孤單靈魂的天使　
跟我說以後對她做什麼事情都可以
“無論是色色的事情還是什麼.....都可以呦！"

單身30年連女生的手都沒碰過的我, 感覺這一切都來的太突然了.....
我要怎麼和這位少女相處呢？

感覺自從這位少女出現後, 這世界變得越來越詭異跟奇怪
究竟這世界發生了甚麼事？

◆玩法

遊戲主要玩法是與美少女"奈西雅"一起生活, 可以隨意做色色的事，
也可以帶奈西雅去各個地方旅遊享受戀愛的感覺，
增加感情並解鎖各種甜蜜事件。

遊戲有大量的服裝, 跟各種情趣道具，
可以解鎖各種Ｈ體位, 也可以讓美少女穿著各種Ｈ衣服來Ｈ，
甚至拿繩子玩起SM, 綑綁Ｈ都可以。

但在看起來跟天堂一樣的生活中, 卻到處散發著不合理的詭異之處，
如果你持續的探索, 莫名的恐懼和詭異的事件接踵而來。

你是選擇就此沉淪於美夢中，還是克服一切的恐懼探索這個世界的真相？

◆遊戲特色

◇41張基本CG，包含差分200張以上。
◇8套服裝自由切換。
◇遊戲文字11萬字。
◇戀愛養成，+克蘇魯詭異風格遊戲。
◇兩位女角全程語音日本聲優配音。
◇遊戲結局：7種

telegram :

telegram :
data.short_description: 《惡魔少女》為一款結合戀愛養成與克蘇魯詭異風格的遊戲。某天，睡醒後發現一位美麗少女，可與她快樂生活做各種Ｈ的事，或者選擇探索世界的真相........
data.supported_languages:
繁體中文, 英文, 法文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 俄文, 日文*, 泰文, 簡體中文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 韓文, 義大利文, 波蘭文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

最低配備:

  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6 or Later
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6 or Later
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Devil Girl
data.detailed_description:
When you gaze at the abyss, the abyss also gazes at you.

◆Featured Systems

◇Full CG mode can be turned on in the environment setting, and HCG can be freely browsed.
◇Pressure-Free Operation Support one-click mouse operation-Fast text-to-text system

◆Story

“Hey, wake up, how long are you going to sleep?"
A young girl with blond hair and red pupils was sitting on a chair, looking at me proudly, rubbing her eyes.

The girl said she was an angel sent from heaven to save my lonely soul.
She told me that I could do whatever I wish to her from now on.
"Whether it's a sex thing or anything ..... is fine!"

I had been single for 30 years and had never even touched a girl's hand, but it all came so suddenly .....
How was I going to get along with this girl?

The world became increasingly strange and bizarre since this girl appeared.
What on earth was going on in the world?

◆Play Method

The main play method is to live with the beautiful girl "Nethia", who can do whatever you want.
You can also take Nethia on trips to various places to enjoy the feeling of love, increase emotions, and unlock various sweet events.

The game has a large number of costumes and a variety of fun props.
You can unlock all kinds of H-positions, and you can also let the girls wear all kinds of H-clothes to match H.
You can even play SM with a rope and even bondage H. But in a life that looks like paradise, there are irrational and bizarre things everywhere.

If you persist in your quest, inexplicable fears, and strange events will come one after another.

Would you rather sink into a dream, or overcome all your fears and discover the truth of the world?

◆Game Features

◇41 basic CGs, including more than 200 differences.

◇The heroin can change 8 different sets of clothes
◇Game text 80,000 words.
◇Love building, + Cthulhu weird style game.
◇Contains two completely voiced female characters throughout the entirety of the game.
◇Game endings: 7 kinds

telegram :

data.supported_languages:
Traditional Chinese, English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Japanese*, Thai, Simplified Chinese, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil, Spanish - Latin America, Korean, Italian, Polish
*languages with full audio support
